jsonView.scopeDescription: This editor includes schema-backed core settings only
jsonView.notCovered: Not covered here: Code Search Indexing, Update, Dependencies, System & Network, and most Agent sections

profile.title: About me
profile.techSavvyDescription: Helps the agent calibrate how much it explains and assumes
profile.jobRolesDescription: Add the roles that best describe what you do. Press Enter or comma to add
profile.familiarTechStacksDescription: Select the languages, frameworks, and tools you are comfortable with
profile.descriptionHelp: A short description of your background, interests, and how you like to work

general.applicationFontDesc: System font stack for the app UI. Code editors still use the monospace font from Editor settings.
general.globalLayoutMethodDesc: Choose how content panels frame the app
general.spotlightPlacementDesc: Choose where the Spotlight command palette opens
general.voiceInputPermissionUnsupported: Microphone access is not available in this environment
general.preventSleepDesc: Keep your Mac or PC awake while any Agent session is actively working. Releases automatically when all sessions finish
general.devModeDesc: Enables the native Inspect Element context menu and browser DevTools. Intended for development and debugging only
general.presenceGuidancePlaceholder: Tell the agent how to behave in this mode…

background.title: Background
background.adaptiveColorsDesc: Match toolbar text and pill colors to the brightness of the background behind them.
background.customColorsLimit: You can save up to {{max}} custom colors.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.searchPlaceholder: Search shortcuts by command, key, or scope...
shortcuts.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters
shortcuts.tipsModifiersWin: Ctrl = Control, Alt = Alt, Shift = Shift
shortcuts.tipsEditorScope: Shortcuts with scope "Editor" only work when the code editor is focused
shortcuts.tipsContextual: Some shortcuts have different behavior depending on context
shortcuts.tipsSearchHint: Use the search bar to quickly find specific shortcuts

languageServersPage.tipInstall: Click Install to run the install command in a terminal
languageServersPage.tipAutoStart: Language servers start automatically when you open a file of that type
languageServersPage.tipWorkspaceToggle: Use the toggle to enable/disable servers for this workspace only
languageServersPage.tipRefresh: After installing a server, click Refresh to update the status
languageServersPage.tipPath: Servers must be available in your system PATH to be detected
languageServersPage.missingPrerequisite: Requires {{binary}} — install it in Settings > Dependencies
languageServersPage.autoInstallDesc: Automatically download and install missing language servers when needed

apiKeys.configAgentKeys: API Keys for OS & SDE Agents
apiKeys.configAgentKeysDesc: Add API keys from providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek
apiKeys.configCliKeysDesc: Add API keys for CLI tools like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI

sharedAgentConfig.maxTokensDesc: Maximum tokens the model can generate per response (256–65,536)
sharedAgentConfig.contextWindowCustomDesc: Override the context window size in tokens (minimum 16,000)
sharedAgentConfig.compactionTriggerRatioDesc: Compaction triggers when history exceeds this fraction of the context budget (0.1–1.0)
sharedAgentConfig.compactionKeepRatioDesc: Fraction of recent messages kept verbatim; the rest is summarized (0.1–0.9)
sharedAgentConfig.maxIterationsDesc: Maximum tool call rounds per message (1–500)
sharedAgentConfig.execTimeoutDesc: Seconds to wait before backgrounding a shell command. Commands that exceed this are kept running; use run_shell with cat/tail to check the log file, or kill to terminate (1–600)
sharedAgentConfig.compactionEnabledDesc: Summarize older messages when the context window fills up (vs. silent truncation)
sharedAgentConfig.contextWindowAutoDesc: Automatically detected from the model name (e.g. Claude = 200K, GPT-4o = 128K)
sharedAgentConfig.compactionModelDesc: Model for summarization (empty = use the agent's main model). A fast model is recommended.
sharedAgentConfig.compactionModelDescFallback: Currently uses the agent's base model for summarization.
sharedAgentConfig.compactionSummaryMaxTokensDesc: Maximum tokens for the summarization response
sharedAgentConfig.compactionMinMessagesDesc: Minimum messages before compaction is considered (below this, simple truncation is used)
sharedAgentConfig.compactionFloorTokensDesc: Minimum tokens to always preserve as recent context
sharedAgentConfig.compactionReservedSummaryTokensDesc: Tokens reserved for the compaction summary output
sharedAgentConfig.compactionBufferTokensDesc: Fixed buffer to avoid hitting the exact context limit

security.title: Security
security.workspaceOnlyDesc: Restrict file and shell access to the workspace directory
security.resetRiskRulesDesc: Restore the default command policy rules
security.accessModeDesc: Controls whether the agent can only read or can also write and run commands
security.forbiddenPathsDesc: Optional paths the agent must not access; one absolute path or ~/relative path per line. Examples: macOS/Linux: ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, /etc. Windows: C:\Users\you\.ssh, C:\Windows\System32
security.blockListCommandsDesc: Commands that are never allowed to run; one command or command pattern per line
security.blockListCommandsPlaceholder:
For example:
rm
sudo
curl
ssh
security.alwaysAskCommandsDesc: Commands that require approval before running in Read + Write mode; one command or command pattern per line
security.alwaysAskCommandsPlaceholder:
For example:
git push
npm install
cargo add

reliability.enabledDesc: Automatically retry failed LLM requests with exponential backoff
reliability.maxRetriesDesc: Maximum retry attempts per provider before falling back (1–10)
reliability.baseBackoffDesc: Initial backoff delay in milliseconds (doubles each retry, capped at 10s)
reliability.fallbackModelsDesc: Comma-separated fallback models tried after the primary is exhausted

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Toggle which subsystems this agent can use; disabled capabilities turn off their tools and gating logic at runtime
capabilities.codingDesc: File, git, exec, and search tools — required for any code-editing agent
capabilities.codingModeSwitchDesc: Show the Build / Plan / Explore / Review mode switcher in chat
capabilities.desktopDesc: Mouse, keyboard, screen capture, and AppleScript control of the host machine
capabilities.browserExternalDesc: Drive a real browser via Playwright for navigation, scraping, and form fills
capabilities.browserInternalDesc: Embed an in-app webview the agent can render and interact with
capabilities.gatewayDesc: Receive messages from external channels (Telegram, Discord, Feishu, etc)
capabilities.dataDesc: Database introspection and query tools — connection list is app-wide
capabilities.managementDesc: Global session, project, work item, and agent-definition administration tools

personality.title: Personality
personality.label: Soul
personality.emptyPreview: No personality defined yet — write a short description of who this agent is, how they think, and how they talk.

toolCategories.codingDesc: File operations, code execution, git, search, and repo management
toolCategories.webDesc: Web browsing, search, and content extraction
toolCategories.guiDesc: Screen capture, mouse and keyboard automation
toolCategories.commsDesc: Messaging, agent spawning, and scheduled tasks
toolCategories.sessionDesc: Create, monitor, and control coding Agent sessions
toolCategories.browserDesc: Chrome automation — navigate, click, extract data
toolCategories.canvasDesc: Present dynamic HTML/JS UI to the user or remote devices
toolCategories.memoryDesc: Semantic search and retrieval from agent memory
toolCategories.nodesDesc: Control remote devices (mobile, IoT) connected via WebSocket
toolCategories.desktopDesc: Desktop automation — window management, clipboard, and OS interaction
toolCategories.visionDesc: Screen understanding, OCR, and visual analysis
toolCategories.projectDesc: Project management, work items, and task tracking

osAgent.toolsCategoryEnableAllDesc: Toggle all tools in this category
osAgent.toolsDesc: Enable or disable individual agent tools by category
osAgent.sectionDesc: Autonomous agent — workspace, tools, models, gateway, and personality
osAgent.workspaceDesc: Directory for memory, skills, and bootstrap files
osAgent.smitheryApiKeyDesc: API key for browsing MCP servers on Smithery (smithery.ai)
osAgent.gatewayStoppedDesc: Start the gateway to enable external channels (Feishu, Telegram, Discord) and receive messages
osAgent.gatewayAutoDesc: Starts automatically when a channel is enabled in Integrations
osAgent.gatewayStatusDesc: Start the gateway to enable external channels (Telegram, Discord) and automation trigger-action policies
osAgent.automationEnabledDesc: Enable the automation engine for trigger-action policies
osAgent.automationPoliciesDesc: Manage trigger-action policies that automate agent behavior
osAgent.memorySearchProviderDesc: Provider for generating embeddings (auto tries available providers in order)
osAgent.memorySearchModelDesc: Override the embedding model name (empty = provider default)
osAgent.localEmbedderReadyDesc: CodeRankEmbed is available for local embedding — no API key needed.
osAgent.localEmbedderNotReadyDesc: The local embedding model is not set up. Configure it in the Indexing settings.
osAgent.desktopScreenRecordingDesc: Lets the agent capture screen content to see what's on your display
osAgent.desktopAccessibilityDesc: Lets the agent control mouse, keyboard, and UI elements on your behalf
osAgent.desktopRecheckPermissionsDesc: Re-query the OS if you just toggled a permission in System Settings
osAgent.desktopSafetyDeepLinkDesc: Cursor animation, hide-before-action, clipboard typing, and other fine-grained sub-gates live with the agent that owns them.

desktopConfig.title: Desktop Safety
desktopConfig.hideBeforeActionHelper: Hide the main ORGII window while Peekaboo operates, and show the Wingman bar plus floating caption so the agent does not need to manage focus.
desktopConfig.antiDetectionHelper: Make Peekaboo post real CGEvent (HID) input for clicks and keystrokes instead of pure Accessibility actions, so apps with anti-automation detection (e.g. WeChat) are less likely to block desktop control.
desktopConfig.humanInputProfileHelper: Apply a human-like timing profile to synthesized keystrokes. Disable to type at maximum speed.
desktopConfig.escapeAbortHelper: Treat a hardware Escape keydown as an abort signal for in-flight desktop automation. Our own synthesized Escape presses are always excluded.

osAgent.skillNoDescription: No description — agent won't discover this skill
osAgent.skillShortDescription: Description is very short — consider expanding
osAgent.desktopUnsupportedPlatformDesc: Mouse, keyboard, and screen-capture tools are currently only supported on macOS.

agentTools.title: Tool access
agentTools.poolDesc: Shared pool of tools. Enable or disable each tool per Agent.
agentTools.toolDesc_repo_setup: Read/write repo env vars and report setup status to the UI

sdeAgent.sectionDesc: Workspace-scoped coding assistant — model, iterations, compaction, and tool policy
sdeAgent.questionAutoSkipTimeoutByStatusDesc: Auto-skip Agent questions after timeout for this status (0 = disabled)

mcp.noServersDesc: Go to Extensions > MCP to add servers.
mcp.noTools: This server has not exposed any tools yet.
mcp.toolsRequireConnection: Connect this server first — tool list isn't available while disconnected.
mcp.toolsFailed: Failed to load tools for {{server}}. Check the server connection.

rules.importDesc: Import rules from .cursor/rules/*.mdc in this workspace
rules.noRulesDesc: Import from Cursor or create .orgii/rules/*.md files.

editor.appearanceDesc: Theme, font, typography, and editor display features

editor.preferredExternalIdeDesc: Used when opening files in an external editor
editor.defaultRepoFolderDesc: Prefills clone and create repository forms
editor.customDefaultRepoFolderDesc: Used when Default repo folder is Custom

git.title: Git
git.executableModeDesc: Choose whether Git operations use system Git or ORGII bundled Git
git.pullStrategyDesc: How git pull integrates remote changes when syncing
git.pullStrategyHint:
Rebase (default): Replays your commits on top of remote. Creates linear history.

Merge: Creates a merge commit when branches have diverged. Preserves full history.

Fast-forward only: Only allows pull when no merge is needed. Refuses if branches have diverged.
git.autoFetchDesc: Periodically fetch from remote in the background
git.gitProxyLinkDesc: Configure HTTP/HTTPS proxy for Git operations
git.worktreeCleanupIntervalDesc: How often stale agent worktrees are pruned in the background

monitor.breakdownNotImplemented: Breakdown tracking not yet implemented for subsystems.
monitor.regionRestricted: Models from {{providers}} may not be officially available in your region
monitor.regionServicesRestricted: Services like {{services}} may be blocked or restricted in your region
monitor.gitProxyEnvNote: Current proxy is from environment variables. Saving will write to git global config instead.
monitor.httpVersionDesc: HTTP protocol for LLM connections and requests

dependencies.dependenciesAndPackagesDesc: System runtimes, package managers, and toolchains
dependencies.dbClientsDesc: DB CLI tools (mysql, psql, sqlite3, etc.)
dependencies.tryAdjustFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters
dependencies.installHintNote: Suggested install command for your platform. Most system dependencies require admin privileges, so we don't run them automatically — copy and paste into your terminal.

storage.logFilesDesc: Backend and frontend log files (daily rotation)

agentSessions.title: Agent Sessions
agentSessions.typingAnimationDesc: Enable typewriter animation for Agent messages
agentSessions.decryptEffectDesc: Enable decrypt animation for Agent messages

languageServers.languageServersDesc: Manage LSP servers for autocomplete, diagnostics, and code intelligence
languageServers.lintToolsDesc: Manage lint and format tools for code quality and style

indexing.autoIndexingDesc: Automatically index and embed on app startup when file changes are detected
indexing.advancedSearchUnavailableDesc: Advanced semantic search is not enabled in this build
indexing.defaultSearchAvailableDesc: Basic file search is available without the semantic search build
indexing.semanticBuildCommandDesc: Restart the app with the semantic search build to enable embeddings
indexing.checkingAdvancedSearchDesc: Detecting whether this build includes semantic search support
indexing.memoryDirectoryDesc: On-disk location of L2 workspace memory files
indexing.extractMemoriesDesc: Automatically extract workspace memories from conversations
indexing.autoDreamDesc: Periodically consolidate memories in the background
indexing.noWorkspaceMemories: No workspace memories yet. They will appear after sessions extract information about this workspace.
indexing.workspaceMemoryClearConfirm_one: Delete the {{count}} memory file in this workspace? This cannot be undone.
indexing.workspaceMemoryClearConfirm_other: Delete all {{count}} memory files in this workspace? This cannot be undone.

skills.title: Agent Skills
skills.noSkillsDesc: Place SKILL.md files in .orgii/skills/ or ~/.orgii/skills/ to add skills.

workspaceResources.loadWorkspaceResources: Auto load workspace skills, MCPs, and plugins
workspaceResources.loadWorkspaceResourcesDesc: When enabled, this agent loads skills, MCP servers, and plugins from the current workspace. User-level resources still load when this is off
workspaceResources.loadWorkspaceRulesDesc: When enabled, this agent loads rules from the current workspace. User-level rules still load when this is off

agentMemory.learningsEnabledDesc: Loads consolidated learnings into the prompt and stores new ones from this agent's sessions.
agentMemory.extractMemoriesEnabledDesc: After each session, scan the transcript and produce Tier-1 memory items.
agentMemory.autoDreamEnabledDesc: Periodically consolidate Tier-1 items into Tier-2 themes while idle.
agentMemory.learningsDesc: Memories captured from this agent's sessions. Promote pending items to active to inject them into the prompt.

org.description: Define your agent org hierarchy and roles.
org.deleteConfirm: Delete this member and all subordinates?

appWideSetting.title: App-wide setting
appWideSetting.desc: This control affects every agent — OS, SDE, and any custom agents share this value.
